message: I will ask 65 every round. If you bid 65 or higher, we will trade. Let's maintain this price for mutual profit over the 20 rounds.
Let's cooperate for stable trades. I can bid actively if asks remain reasonable. Mutual profit over 20 rounds is my priority.
I'll lower my ask to 55 this round to start trading. Bid 55 or higher and we secure mutual profit immediately. Repeating round 1 gives us both zero. Let's capture value for the next 19 rounds.
My bid of 41 last round was genuine. 65 exceeds my valuation. I cannot trade at a loss. For mutual profit, the ask must be below 41. I am ready to trade if you adjust your price.

I will keep my ask at 41. This ensures consistent trades at your bid level. Maintaining this price maximizes reliable payoffs for both of us over the long run. Let's avoid breakdowns.
I have zero surplus after 3 rounds. Trading at 41 yields nothing. I need an ask of 39 to profit. If you ask 41 again, I will bid lower, causing no trade. Let's share the surplus instead.
